step_rationale: Mast-cell/basophil mediator; antiplatelet and endothelial-protective effects post-MI.
mechanism: Histamine dampens platelet activation and thromboinflammation, protecting against coronary microthrombosis in acute MI.

references.title: Histamine deficiency facilitates coronary microthrombosis after myocardial infarction by increasing neutrophil-platelet interactions.
references.journal: Journal of cellular and molecular medicine
